name: toast-creator
description: Author Toast automations from natural language, then test and deploy them with a build, test, and publish workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, and publish Toast automations.
interface.longDescription: Dough Creator helps Codex author Toast automation workspaces, statically validate them, register and bake-test them against a running Toast backend, and publish verified artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Create a Toast automation that summarizes new videos.
